center.name: 塞舌尔克里奥尔语
center.summary: 塞舌尔克里奥尔语是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Seychelles sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Seychelles, where it is known as kolibri in Seychellois Creole

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the Seychelles, where it is known as kolibri in Seychellois Creole
